sections.paragraph:
Original: תּקוה

Transliteration: tiqvâh

Phonetic: tik-vaw'

BDB Definition:

Tikvath or Tikvah = "hope"
  1. father of Shallum, the husband of the prophetess Huldah in the time of king Josiah of Judah
  2. father of Tikvah in the time of Ezra

Origin: the same as H8615

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
